title: Biological Neuron Signal Processing
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of signal reception, integration, and transmission in a biological neuron, highlighting key components.
relationships: Dendrites receive signals from other neurons
Signals are integrated in the Soma
If the integrated signal exceeds a threshold at the Axon Hillock, an action potential is generated
The action potential travels down the Axon, aided by the Myelin Sheath and regenerated at the Nodes of Ranvier
The signal triggers neurotransmitter release at the Synaptic Terminals to communicate with the next neuron
